topology.summary: Green Bit's northern iron bridge and Doflamingo's palace on the central King's Plateau are different structures. Pica later changes the landscape and palace placement, so both layouts require separate variants.

temporal_variants.state: Crown-shaped King's Plateau is central and the royal palace sits atop it.
Landscape is rearranged; the palace is relocated to a newly formed King's Plateau at Flower Hill.
Birdcage encloses the island as a temporary event volume.

event_scenes.state_delta: Terrain and palace position transform into the later battle layout.
event_scenes.camera_cue: Lock camera above the city so the terrain displacement reads as a before/after transformation.

event_scenes.state_delta: A contracting cage volume overlays the kingdom.
event_scenes.camera_cue: Orbit outside the cage, then pass through to the palace/plateau axis.

chapter_logic.default_rule: Render the latest verified state whose reveal chapter is less than or equal to the reader chapter.
chapter_logic.unknown_gate_rule: Do not render a chapter_to_verify state until its exact gate is confirmed.

coordinate_policy.atlas_anchor: Use the app coordinate only to place or open the local scene on the globe.
coordinate_policy.local_topology: Build only from cited containment and relationship evidence. Never infer local bearings or distances from deterministic atlas jitter.
coordinate_policy.runtime: Use an expanded local inset, path graph, or moving entity transform when a single flat raster cannot express the place.

visual_program.master_scene: One Blender master scene with addressable collections for topology nodes, chapter states, event actors, atmosphere, and runtime LODs.
must_show: Green Bit as a distinct northern island
colosseum, Flower Hill, and underground factory as distinct landmarks
must_not_show: the Green Bit bridge leading directly to Doflamingo's palace
pre- and post-Pica layouts combined into one impossible map
visual_program.runtime_handoff: Export static environment and event-state collections separately; MapLibre controls anchor, visibility, route progress, and chapter gate.

unresolved: Exact chapter of the Pica landscape transition.
Exact chapter at which the Birdcage becomes visible.
Exact local bearings for secondary landmarks not fixed by cited topology.
